reviews.content: Best n dependable n reasonably priced  products.
Wonderful product for travelling. Lot of space. Loved it.
Love the product as easy to manage and has good capacity to pack stuff. Waterproof and quality is good.
I used the bag for trekking, some more chains can be present. I found it comfortable during my treks.

Decathlon advertises a 2-year warranty, but my experience with their warranty support has been extremely disappointing. I raised a claim for a product that was less than one month old. Initially, their team approved the process and instructed me to destroy the product and share images so that a refund could be processed.I followed their instructions and destroyed the product as requested. after so , the claim was suddenly rejected stating it was “wear and tear.

I like the killer feature unlike traditional top loading trekking bags where you have to dig to the bottom for a clean pair of socks, this unzips like a suitcase. It makes organization infinitely easier.
I feel like it can survive being tossed onto the roof of a bus or dragged through an airport without the fabric fraying.

This product is insane value for money. It’s the perfect size for bike trips (decent alternate to saddle bags) or backpacking for 3-4 days. Have used it for 2 trips in the last one year and the quality is top notch. Zips are great quality and the bag has just the right number of pockets. Nothing less than 5 star.
Despite heavy load, this bag make it easy on my bag to carry. Large compartment and durable material, and double opening for easier access and so far I'm satisfied with this purchased.
Affordable for a huge size backpack
Very good ,attractive worth for the price, more comfortable.
This backpack is very good never miss it where I go

Product is of good quality and the multi purpose make (Travel & Hike/Trek) was awesome with different openings for easy access.
The look was good too. Best for travel and 3 days hikes/treks.
Due to no rain cover in my bag, my bag got full dusted on it
Great deal. Comes with a complimentary rain cover as well. Looks good and ideal for hiking.
I am a traveller, who visit places on bike, i bought this bag and used in 2 trips of 2 week each, that bag is easy to use its tough and rigid.
背包很结实，还有雨衣，户外徒步几天非常实用

กระเป๋าเป้สามารถปรับระดับแผ่นรองหลังให้เหมาะกับสรีระร่างกายของแต่ละคนได้ ทำให้การสะพายกระเป๋าเป้กระชับกับลำตัวได้ดี ลดอาการเมื่อยล้าของร่างกายได้ ช่องใหญ่ของกระเป๋าเป้สามารถเปิดได้จนสุด ทำให้จัดและเก็บของได้ง่าย
I had been searching for a good travel bag for some time and i think i have locked on the best one
The bag was good. If  there is external pockets to put small easy access items will added values.
สินค้าใบใหญ่ ในราคาที่ถูก ถ้าเทียบไชค์ 60L กับตัวอื่นถือว่าราคาถูกมาก มีผ้าคลุมกันน้ำแถมให้ในกระเป๋า ไม่ต้องชื้อเพิ่ม ชิปเปิดช่องกระเป๋าหลัก ใหญ่แข็งแรงดี ดูน่าจะทน ที่เหลือก็แค่ ออกไปแตะขอบฟ้า
No tension for carry more than 2 bags,everything is in , satisfied with this
Price is high but quality is also very good
Easy opening and good quality fabric
Actually i live this feature of trolley bag chain system, rest built quality is super amazing …
Its a very good spacious bag....its comfortable to carry... Carry everything
nice design also its so spacious
I’m using it from last 6 months and it’s too good
One of the best backpack in market
Alot can fit in good for carry on if you go for short holiday

I've been using thing for a month
1. I liked the 180 bag opening for easy accessibility of packed stuffs.
2. The metal spine for proper weight distribution over the body.
3. Quality of the material and the zips.
4. The fit. When it put on the bagback it fits like it's hugging me.

-> it's a Lil expensive product.

I used this in spiti trip on bike
Great product
Les meilleurs produits a moi bonne travail et bonne courage 💪
Muy espacioso, las correas son de calidad y en general cumple con todo lo especificado.
Good product... material quality is excellent... Best part of this bag, it's open like a suitcase.... And that's why you can arrange all the item easily...

The backpack turned out amazing, it can be carried in cabin luggage for flights which helps save quite a bit of time and less worries of the airlines misplacing the luggage! Big enough to accommodate for long or short travel, very comfortable and sturdy

glad to have several colors choices to choose from according to personal preference so there are options. there are several compartments that allow to place stuff separately, big enough to place plenty of things with ease of access.

Best value for money product
Light weight and high durability

Fits a lot of stuff !
Many compartments make it easy to store different things.
Very convenient because it opens as a luggage.
Many different compartments for different items. Easy to access. Comfortable to carry.
Çok memnunum, hem kaliteli hem kullanışlı bir çanta. Her yerde cebi var ve çok şey sığıyor içine
Great bag ! Big compartment and easy approach.. love it
Bag is good, but i need the bag which can carry 17 inch laptop, & i asked decathlon sales executive, she informed me like that bag is suitable for 17 inch laptop. Unfortunately its not.

It is an excellent product. I suggest that people how carry for 2 to 3 day trip it is enough and more organized so we still left with some space to bring memories back with us . And comes to model hip strap is small cause I am heavy if little increase in strap I fell like i have a pocket instead of back pocket
Spacious and big.. Alot of items in the bag but didn't feel too heavy coz of the shoulder strap :)
I completely recommend it (i love back bags )

Duży i dobrze zaprojektowany plecak. łatwy dostęp do zawartości, dodatkowa przegroda na buty lub kosmetyczkę. Duża pojemność. Kolor mógłby być ciemniejszy, łatwo się brudzi. brakuje też breloka na klucze.
Too much small size,not ok,not of any use at all
Design was prefect and suitable. And the stability was good. Wish it could have more grip on and inner compartment storage.
Very Nice bag. If head pouch is detachable it wud be good. However no complaints.. as that facility is available in different model
best bag for bagpacking and travel
Good one. Don't think its a good option for backpacking travels. But good for bike ride or other travels.
The BEST backpack I could ever purchase. The access to main to the compartments, the additional compartment on the top of the bag. Such a lovely bag to bring on vacations.
Suitable for traveling to fill clothes for a 3 night stay. Very suitable because my clothes are large in size.
Overall its good but chain zip tags are of poor quality as their threads are unfolding and need replacement
Tạm ổn, ngoại hình không nổi trội. Nhưng công dụng ok.
帽子非常喜欢，背包非常霸气
Was excellent and upto the needs of a trekker
Resistente, grande e compacta, leve e você consegue deixar ela nas suas medidas
10 Year warranty is what I'm attacked towards. I'm waiting for the results but till the time it very cool bag to carry on
Purchasing time it's looking small size but after usage this extra large size. after few minutes walking bag weight fully comes to one side better go for 40 or 50 L

Should have added more pockets and compartments(just like laptop bags). The look is very subjective and I'm personally Not a big fan of it, it works. There should be one more water-bottle pocket and in the front could've added another compartment with small pockets. These are very basic things that smaller companies are providing at their entry level bagpacks(on the plbasis of price),so if you're charging a premium price atleast provide basic features.
The product is great. Firm and strong with good locks but it has to do better with its design.

Great Backpack With Lots Of Features And Design 
In This Budget This Is A Great Choice
Comprei para fazer um mochilão, qualidade incrível, super espaçosa, vem um compartimento para notebook, pra mim foi ótimo pois trabalho remoto.
haven't used regulaerly, But with usage of ~once in a quarter, with air luggage travel, in really good quality & suites the needs
A mochila é linda e parece ser bem resistente. Bem espaçosa e deve caber fácil na cabine do avião.
A strong and big bag. I packed a lot of stuff in it during my trip to EU recently. I checked in this bag for my flights and it came out fine.
Bem grande pode ser utilizado de várias vezes

The bag is well-made with durable materials and has a well-designed layout with sufficient compartments and pockets to store various items efficiently, allowing for good organization within the bag's available space
Useful for any tour and travel

Es cómoda, construida con material resistente, aguanta bastante peso y no pierde la forma en la espalda. Es práctico que venga con un forro impermeable y tiene un cierre de facil acceso y otros compartimientos para accesorios.

Good product but inner pockets ergonomics could be better. 
The ruggedness and overall built/design is also nice.
The bag is a value for money, however, I could see the threads coming out here and there. You can go for it, as its under the budget and has good packing range and design.
Good and comfortable backpack. Spacious and easy to pack.
Great space and compartments. Used it a few times. Zips are smooth. Rain cover is reassuring too.
这个包价格合适，功能合理，背上它说走就走。

If you want to have a backpack of the 50 to 60 litres which doesn't necessarily look like a hiking or trekking backpack with all those bells and whistles of straps all around, I think you must give it a good look. Feature wise it is almost no less than a trekking backpack, without absolutely looking like one. It's simple it's elegant, and not to your face all the time. It's minimal, and seems durable. And more importantly the price at which you're getting it. I got it 3499/- which seems a steal considering decathlon rarely drops price.
I love this bag.quality, looks are best
Already travelled North East from Bengaluru, and a few other trips like Thailand.

worth with every penny, but if you combine with cargo bag, it will be great addition since this bag are good for travel and may end up in plane cargo, the cover may protect the bag while handled by ground crew

Value For Money

But the staff of Lucknow Store was very rude, they don't know how to deal with their customers
The bag is good, ordered 2 units but received only one rain cover only in one bag.
Durable, woth every penny, easy to open and nice colour
Looks good bag but can be more solid

However not practical to use. Since the top compartment is convenient to take things in and out, the section becomes heavier. To open the main compartment, you need to unlock all the attachments. After eating food and the main part is somewhat empty, the balance becomes very bad.

plecak powód nietypowy sposób otwierania do którego trzeba się przyzwyczaić. nie testowałem podczas długich wypraw ale duży Zakres regulacji pasków pozwala na noszenie go przez moją córkę która ma 160 wzrostu i przeze mnie 180 wzrostu
Overall compact design, convenient to use and value for money
Its a good bag with a great design .
One of the best value for money rucksack
